title: Image Map
description: Schema for image_map.json produced by seo-image-generate skill

featured_image.description: OG/hero featured image for the article

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the saved image file

alt.description: SEO-optimized alt text including primary keyword

width.description: Image width in pixels (always 1200 for featured)

height.description: Image height in pixels (always 630 for featured)

prompt.description: The generation prompt used to create this image

section_images.description: One image per H2 section of the article

section_heading.description: The H2 heading text this image belongs to

path.description: Relative or absolute path to the saved image file

alt.description: SEO-optimized alt text for this section image

width.description: Image width in pixels (always 800 for section images)

height.description: Image height in pixels (always 450 for section images)

prompt.description: The generation prompt used to create this image

featured_image.alt: Best running shoes for beginners displayed on a wooden surface with a running track in the background
featured_image.prompt: running shoes for beginners, hero banner composition suitable for a blog article, photorealistic, soft natural lighting, no text overlays

section_images.alt: How to choose running shoes — person comparing two pairs of running shoes in a sports store
section_images.prompt: Visual illustration of 'How to Choose Running Shoes', person comparing shoes in a store, photorealistic, soft natural lighting, no text overlays

section_images.alt: Best running shoe brands for beginners arranged on a shelf with price tags visible
section_images.prompt: Visual illustration of 'Best Brands for Beginners' related to running shoes for beginners, brands on a retail shelf, photorealistic, soft natural lighting, no text overlays
